sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (a Array(String), b Array(Int64));
SELECT maxMap(a, b - 5) FROM test_table GROUP BY a;
CREATE TABLE another_table (key Array(Int64), value Array(Float64));
INSERT INTO another_table VALUES ([1, 2, 3], [1.1, 2.2, 3.3]), ([4, 5, NULL], [4.4, NULL, 6.6]);
SELECT maxMap(key, value - CAST(10 AS Float64)) FROM another_table WHERE arrayExists(x -> x IS NOT NULL, key) GROUP BY key;
CREATE TABLE complex_table (k Array(UInt64), v Array(Int32));
SELECT maxMap(CAST(k AS Array(String)), max(v) - 1) FROM complex_table GROUP BY k;
CREATE TABLE final_table (id UInt32, keys Array(String), values Array(Int64));
SELECT maxMap(keys, (values + 2) - NULL) FROM final_table GROUP BY id HAVING arrayLength(keys) > 1;
CREATE TABLE mixed_table (str_col String, int_col Int64);
SELECT maxMap(str_col, int_col - 1) FROM mixed_table WHERE str_col = 'banana' OR str_col = 'apple';
